title: Senior Investment Banker at SBI Life Insurance International Enterprises

jsonLd.title: Senior Investment Banker at SBI Life Insurance International Enterprises
jsonLd.description:
SBI Life Insurance International Enterprises invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Investment Banker at our Jaipur location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About SBI Life Insurance International Enterprises:
SBI Life Insurance International Enterprises is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in QuickBooks

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Referral bonus program
• Learning & development budget
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Jaipur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with SBI Life Insurance International Enterprises!
